app.name: RSSBox
app.one_liner: A self-hosted web application that generates RSS feeds for platforms lacking native support by using APIs or scraping.

screens.name: Feed Generator
screens.purpose: Accept user input URLs and generate corresponding RSS feeds.

rust_commands.name: generate_rss_feed
rust_commands.purpose: Fetch content from a given platform URL and return an RSS feed.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement core feed generation for Instagram and SoundCloud
acceptance_tests: Given a SoundCloud track URL, the system returns a working RSS feed without HTTP 422 errors.
Given an Instagram post URL, the system returns a valid RSS feed with media enclosure.
